text.title: AWS CLI Compute and Storage Operations (EC2 S3 Lambda) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the AWS CLI Compute and Storage Operations (EC2 S3 Lambda) methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: select-operation
step.action: Pick EC2 / S3 / Lambda command sequence.

step.name: compose-script
step.action: Wire credentials (--profile + region), waits, JSON output.

step.name: dry-run
step.action: Run with `--dry-run` or equivalent; verify expected resources.
step.decision-gate: If --dry-run unsupported, run in staging first.
